args.prompt: Extract all key events and dates related to the US Steel/Nippon Steel merger from this document. Include announcement date, deal terms, regulatory milestones, shareholder vote, Biden's statement, CFIUS review, presidential block, lawsuit filing, and any deadline extensions. Format as a list of events with date, description, and source reference. Document: {{wiki_nippon}}

What is the filing date, form type, and what event does this 8-K report? Summarize the material definitive agreement related to the Nippon Steel merger. Include the purchase price per share, enterprise value, and any key terms mentioned. Document: {{us_steel_8k_20231218}}

tool_calls.purpose: Get details from the initial 8-K filing announcing the merger.

args.prompt: Extract the full text of the press release announcing the definitive agreement for Nippon Steel to acquire US Steel. Include the announcement date, key terms (price per share, total consideration), expected closing timeline, and any commitments made (e.g., headquarters, union contracts). Document: {{us_steel_ex991_20231218}}

tool_calls.purpose: Get the joint press release from the merger announcement.

args.prompt: What event does this April 2, 2024 8-K report? Summarize any updates on the merger, regulatory reviews, shareholder vote results, or changes in terms. Document: {{us_steel_8k_20240402}}

tool_calls.purpose: Get the 8-K filed after shareholder vote and any status updates.

args.prompt: Extract the joint statement from US Steel and Nippon Steel regarding President Biden's decision to block the merger. Include the date, key arguments, and any legal actions announced. Document: {{joint_statement_jan3}}

tool_calls.purpose: Get the official response to Biden's block.
